title: geraniospermum grossularioides
intro: Geraniospermum grossularioides, also known as Chinese barberry, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to the mountainous regions of southern China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Geraniospermum grossularioides include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Geraniospermum grossularioides include tea, tincture, and capsules, which can be obtained through commercial suppliers or made at home under proper guidance.
